{{Infobox technique
| name = Sandviper techniques
| introduced = Soulsmith
}}

== Soulsmith ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Sandviper techniques]] are used on prisoner flesh.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c12">''Soulsmith'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Blackflame ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Sandviper techniques]] produce an acid-green glow.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c4">''Blackflame'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Sandviper techniques]] use caustic [[madra]] to melt wood.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c4" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
